Forge Solo
BCH2 + 1175 merge-mining
DashboardHelpSettings

Connect your miner

Stratum URLstratum+tcp://…:3333
Worker usernameyour BCH2 address
Passwordx (anything)

Solo mining: whoever's miner finds a block keeps the full reward (minus nothing — 0% fee). Set your miner's worker/username to the BCH2 address you want paid. Every share also merge-mines 1175 (ESF) for free.

Open dashboard →

Payout & merge-mining

1175 (ESF) payout address— set in Umbrel app settings —
Minimum payout—
Network difficulty—
Pool hashrate—

Your 1175 payout address and minimum payout are set in the Umbrel app's settings for this app (they take effect on restart). BCH2 payouts always go to the address you use as your miner's worker username.

Block signature (coinbase tag)

Coinbase tag

A short label embedded in the coinbase of every block you solo-mine, so your blocks are identifiable on-chain (e.g. Forge). Printable ASCII, up to 24 characters. Takes effect after the miner service restarts.
